model: deepseek-v4-pro sharded review with deepseek-v4-flash synthesis
non_blocking_findings: Pre-final plan metadata showed LFG-P4.4 as pass while LFG-P4.2 was still review_pending; this artifact is recorded with the final plan update that resolves the inconsistency.

scope.diff_summary: Project-management readout logic was extracted from src/workflow/workbench-projection.js into src/workflow/workbench-project-management.js and src/workflow/workbench-project-task-items.js. The projection composer decreased from 1463 to 923 lines; the extracted modules are 167 and 393 lines.

notes: DeepSeek source shards confirmed the projection composer delegates to summarizeProjectManagement without stale local helpers, preserves the two-call base/final nextActionReadout dependency pattern, keeps mobile project_management consumers compatible, and leaves task-item semantics in a bounded 393-line helper. Test shards confirmed project counters, task_items, task_flow, plan_review bindings, latest_dispatch shape, mobile/schema/shell consumers, and major task states remain covered. Metadata shards confirmed both extracted modules are below threshold and the plan/manifest do not overclaim fixed state after this final update. Final synthesis returned PASS.
